name: Is it safe to put details of my personal injury claim into ChatGPT?
description: No, risks confidentiality; anonymize or avoid.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: Is it safe to put details of my personal injury claim into ChatGPT?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, risks confidentiality; anonymize or avoid.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, avoid inputting confidential case details due to data security risks and lack of privilege.[1][2] Prompts with sensitive info could breach confidentiality and become discoverable.[5] Key factors: No encryption for legal data; compliance issues with HIPAA/GDPR; potential for model training use. Use anonymized facts only; rely on secure legal AI tools or lawyers. Consult attorney before any AI use on your claim.
